2.0:
(...What is going on? The sunlight is so strong!?
And it really hurts when it hits my skin!!)
4.0:
It's still early in the day.
Am I really going to head home now?
4.1:
There's still some time before sunset…
Am I really going to head home now?
4.2:
It's extremely hot today.
Maybe it's better to head back early...?
17.0:

Written on it are some words so messy they're almost unreadable—
